title: Lost Property Enquiry at Central Station

turns.speaker: Grace
turns.text: Hello, Central Station Lost Property, Grace speaking. How can I help?

turns.speaker: Daniel
turns.text: Oh, hi. I think I left a bag on a train this morning, and I'm hoping it might have been handed in.

turns.speaker: Grace
turns.text: I can certainly check that for you. Let me open a report. Could I take your name first?

turns.speaker: Grace
turns.text: Could you spell the surname for me, please?

turns.speaker: Grace
turns.text: Thank you. And which train were you travelling on?

turns.speaker: Daniel
turns.text: It was the ten-thirty from Cardiff, and I got off here at Central.

turns.speaker: Grace
turns.text: And do you remember roughly where you were sitting?

turns.speaker: Daniel
turns.text: Yes, I was in the quiet carriage — that was Coach C. The bag was on the luggage rack above my seat.

turns.speaker: Grace
turns.text: Right. And can you describe the bag for me?

turns.speaker: Daniel
turns.text: It's a small rucksack — a backpack. It's dark green, and it's got my laptop inside, which is the main worry.

turns.speaker: Grace
turns.text: Understood. For the insurance section of the form, roughly what would you say the contents are worth?

turns.speaker: Daniel
turns.text: Well, the laptop alone is worth about six hundred pounds, so I'd say six hundred to be safe.

turns.speaker: Grace
turns.text: Thank you. I'll log all of that now. Your reference number is L for London, then four-zero-two-seven. So that's L-4-0-2-7. Please quote that if you call us back.

turns.speaker: Daniel
turns.text: L4027 — got it. And when should I check whether it's turned up?

turns.speaker: Grace
turns.text: We collect all the items from the trains at the end of the day, so I'd suggest calling back after six o'clock this evening.

turns.speaker: Daniel
turns.text: Perfect. Thank you so much for your help, Grace.

questionGroups.instructions_html: Complete the form below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.

questionGroups.prompt: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questionGroups.instructions_html: Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER.

questions.prompt_text: Daniel should call back after ______ this evening.
